home.heroSubtitle: You're the new engineer. Design systems, survive incidents, and climb from Junior to Staff Architect as the company grows from 10 to 10M users.
home.reviewCta: Spaced repetition keeps knowledge sticky. ~5 min.
home.unlockMore: Complete the current quest to unlock more, or check the career map.

map.title: Career Map
map.subtitle: 8 phases · Junior → Staff Architect · ScaleUp grows from 10 to 10M users.

profile.title: Profile
profile.resetConfirm: Reset ALL progress? This wipes XP, streak, badges, and saved architectures. Cannot be undone.

review.title: Daily Review
review.subtitle: Spaced repetition — keep concepts sticky.
review.howWell: How well did you recall it?
review.nextInterval: next interval: {n} → adjusts with your rating
review.reviewedMsg: You reviewed {count} concepts. Come back tomorrow.
review.reviewedMsgOne: You reviewed {count} concept. Come back tomorrow.
review.emptyHint: Learn new concepts and reviews will queue up here automatically.

lesson.label: Lesson
lesson.firstTryBonus: Pass first-try for a mastery star ⭐.
lesson.fiftyFiftyHint: Remove two wrong options — forfeits the first-try bonus
lesson.tryAgain: Re-read and try again to bank the XP.

incident.label: Incident
incident.stepRootCause: Step {n} — What is the root cause?
incident.stepMitigate: Step {n} — What is your immediate mitigation?
incident.stepPrevent: Step {n} — How do you prevent a recurrence?
incident.reviewFeedback: Review the feedback and try again.

command.label: Command Lab
command.notRecognized: command not recognized — try again, or use the hint.
command.tip: Tip: commands are matched flexibly — press Enter to run.

lesson.label: Lesson
lesson.blurb: Learn a concept, then prove it with a quiz.

architecture.label: Architecture
architecture.blurb: Drag components onto the canvas and hit your targets.

incident.label: Incident
incident.blurb: The system's down. Diagnose it like an SRE.

command.label: Command Lab
command.blurb: Run real-looking commands in a simulated terminal.

canvas.buildHint: Build a topology, then run the simulation to see your metrics vs. the targets.
canvas.tapTarget: Tap a target node to connect
canvas.connectHint: Tap-to-connect: choose this as the source, then tap a target
canvas.emptyHint: Tap a component to add it. Connect with drag, or tap a node → Connect → tap target.

feedback.disconnected: 🔌 Your topology is disconnected — wire a path from the edge to a database.
feedback.missingType: 🧩 Required component missing: {type}. Add one to the design.
feedback.throughput: 📈 Throughput {actual} rps is below the {target} rps target. Scale out the bottleneck.
feedback.latency: 🐢 p95 latency {actual} ms exceeds the {budget} ms budget. Add caching or move data closer.
feedback.availability: ⚠️ Availability {actual}% is below the {target}% target. Add replicas for failover.
feedback.cost: 💸 Cost ${actual}/mo exceeds the ${budget} budget. Remove over-provisioned nodes.
feedback.allMet: ✅ All targets met. Excellent design — the CTO approves.
